steps: Go to https://www.printful.com/auth/register and create a free account
Log in and go to the Printful Developer Portal at https://developers.printful.com/login
You will be redirected to your tokens page at https://developers.printful.com/tokens
Enter a name for your token, provide a contact email, and set an expiration date
Copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again after you leave this page

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Printful private API token, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: The token is shown only once at creation — copy and store it securely
Private Tokens are for personal/single-store use; Public Apps (OAuth) are for multi-user integrations
Token expiration date is required — choose a date far in the future if you need long-lived tokens
A Printful store must be created before the API token can be used for store-specific operations
Catalog endpoints (browse products) work without a store; order and sync endpoints require a store
Rate limit: 120 requests per minute per access token

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve list of stores associated with the account
